channel.title: Mikhail Stock Library
channel.description: Commercial images for technology, business, industry, healthcare and modern visual communication.

item.title: Scientist analyzing digital data on holographic interface in laboratory
item.description: Scientist analyzing digital data on holographic interface in laboratory. Subjects: scientist, laboratory, research, technology, hologram, digital, interface, datum, analysis, medicals, science, chemistry. License this image on Adobe Stock.
